race.comment: PROPHET'S LASS (11) looks close to a win after placing at both runs. Peaking now and draws to be blending in beautifully at the top of the straight. STAR OF INDIGO (12) returns and looks to have come on nicely during the break. Showed good early speed on debut, so expect her to be right there throughout. DON'T SAY DO (7) returns for the Northam camp. Mixed her form last time in but her best looks good enough on her best and has trialled well in readiness. MAY BE BUBBLES (9) resumes from a spell of five months and is having her first outing under new trainer David J Smith. Will be fit enough for this following a recent trial win.
